explanation.summary: This portfolio has an aggressive risk score of 67.0 out of 100, meaning its value could move around a lot. The estimated annualized volatility is 27.3%, and the worst historical decline was -54.0%, so a large drop is a real risk to be prepared for.
top_risk_factors: High concentration: the top 3 holdings make up 73.8% of the portfolio.
Sector concentration: Technology is 68.5% of the portfolio, so results depend heavily on that sector.
Limited diversification: the portfolio has 5 holdings, which can make performance more sensitive to a few positions.
High volatility: estimated annualized volatility is 27.3%, which suggests bigger ups and downs.
review_checklist: Are you comfortable with an aggressive risk score of 67.0 out of 100?
Would a worst historical decline of -54.0% be acceptable for your financial plan and time horizon?
Are you comfortable having 68.5% of the portfolio in Technology and 73.8% in the top 3 holdings?

disclaimer: Educational risk coaching, not financial advice. No buy/sell recommendations. Illustrative sample data.
